name: PACCAR
analysis: PCAR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 7% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $121.4400, stop $112.8006, target $147.3582 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
